info.title: UpSpace API
info.description: Comprehensive OpenAPI reference for UpSpace. The spec is generated from the live `src/app/api/v1/**/route.ts` inventory and enriched with domain-specific descriptions so Scalar and the markdown API reference stay aligned.

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Data export and account-adjacent utility endpoints.

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Administration dashboards, moderation queues, payout operations, and verification review flows.

tags.name: AI
tags.description: Conversational assistant endpoints and persisted AI conversation state.

tags.name: Amenities
tags.description: Static amenity and review-tag lookup endpoints used by forms and filters.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Profile sync, sign-up, deactivation, reactivation, and account removal flows.

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Customer, partner, and admin booking operations including creation, updates, cancellation, and receipts.

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Marketplace chat rooms, message history, and moderation reporting.

tags.name: Complaints
tags.description: Customer complaints and the partner/admin workflows used to resolve them.

tags.name: Financial
tags.description: Checkout creation plus provider-backed payout-account setup and synchronization.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: In-app notification listing and read/delete mutations.

tags.name: Partner
tags.description: Partner dashboard, inventory, verification, and custom pricing-rule management endpoints.

tags.name: Public Spaces
tags.description: Public marketplace listing, detail, availability, reviews, and inventory discovery endpoints.

tags.name: Wallet
tags.description: Partner wallet balances, payouts, refunds, and transaction history.

SupabaseSession.name: sb-access-token
SupabaseSession.description: Authenticated browser requests typically rely on the Supabase session cookies established by the App Router auth flow. Some server-to-server integrations may instead attach a valid Supabase bearer token.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error envelope used across UpSpace route handlers.

error.description: Human-readable error label returned by most route handlers.

message.description: Alternative error message used by some handlers.

errors.description: Field-level validation details when a Zod payload parse fails.

MessageResponse.description: Simple mutation response for endpoints that only need to acknowledge work.

CursorPagination.description: Cursor pagination contract used by most list endpoints.

hasMore.description: Whether another page can be fetched with the returned cursor.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor that should be passed back as the next request cursor.

is_open.description: Whether the space is open on the given weekday.

WeeklyAvailabilityInput.description: Weekly opening-hours grid required when a space is created.

path.description: Storage path for the uploaded image asset.

category.description: Optional semantic label for the image.

is_primary.description: Whether this image should be used as the hero image.

path.description: Storage path for the uploaded verification document.

requirement_id.description: Verification checklist item satisfied by the document.

slot_id.description: Optional UI slot identifier used when multi-document uploads are grouped.

CreateSpaceRequest.description: Create a new space listing together with its address, amenities, and availability.

address_subunit.description: Optional building, floor, or landmark detail.

amenities.description: Amenity choice identifiers attached to the listing.

images.description: Optional marketing photos and display order.

verification_documents.description: Optional verification documents collected during space creation.

UpdateSpaceRequest.description: Patch-style payload accepted by the basic `/spaces/{space_id}` PUT handler.

SpaceRecord.description: Representative serialized space object returned by the REST API.

user_id.description: Numeric owner identifier serialized as a string.

data.description: Space records that matched the current query.

AmenityChoice.description: Amenity definition attached to a space.

category.description: Amenity grouping used by filters and forms.

AmenityAssignmentRequest.description: Attach an amenity choice to a space by amenity name.

name.description: Amenity choice name resolved by the route.

AreaRecord.description: Reservable inventory unit within a coworking space.

max_capacity.description: Maximum supported guest count, serialized as a string.

request_approval_at_capacity.description: Whether capacity edge cases require review.

booking_notes_enabled.description: Whether booking notes are shown to customers.

oneOf.description: Optional booking note rendered in checkout and confirmations.

price_rule_id.description: Pricing rule currently attached to the area.

AreaInput.description: Create or update an area inside a partner-managed space.

automatic_booking_enabled.description: When true, qualifying bookings can auto-confirm.

request_approval_at_capacity.description: When true, edge-of-capacity requests require approval.

advance_booking_enabled.description: When true, lead-time windows are enforced.

booking_notes_enabled.description: Whether booking notes are shown to customers.

price_rule_id.description: Pricing rule to attach to the area.

RateRecord.description: Representative pricing row for a specific area.

label.description: Display label for the rate band.

duration_hours.description: Duration in hours represented by the rate.

price_minor.description: Integer minor-unit amount serialized as a string.

AvailabilityRecord.description: Persisted availability row for a space.

day_of_week.description: ISO-style weekday index used by the database layer.

value.description: Enum value stored in the database.

label.description: UI label shown in review chips and filters.

ReviewListResponse.description: Review list with aggregate statistics and cursor pagination.

breakdown.description: Rating histogram from five stars down to one star.

count.description: Number of reviews in this bucket.

viewer_reviewed.description: Whether the authenticated viewer already reviewed this space.

CreateReviewRequest.description: Create a customer review after a completed booking.

rating_star.description: Star rating from one to five.

BookingRecord.description: Normalized booking record returned by list endpoints.

oneOf.description: Booking total in major currency units.

customerAuthId.description: Supabase auth UUID of the customer.

oneOf.description: Supabase auth UUID of the partner.
Maximum supported capacity for the area.

CreateBookingRequest.description: Create a booking for a specific area and start time.

startAt.description: Optional ISO timestamp for the booking start.

variableOverrides.description: Optional pricing-rule variables supplied by the checkout UI.

BulkBookingStatusUpdateRequest.description: Bulk status mutation used by partner and admin booking dashboards.

ids.description: Booking UUIDs to update in bulk.

cancellationReason.description: Reason shown to counterparties and audit tooling.

space_id.description: Space UUID to bookmark or unbookmark.

read.description: Whether the notification should be marked as read.

ComplaintRecord.description: Complaint record used by customer, partner, and admin dashboards.

ChatMessageRequest.description: Send a chat message, optionally creating a room on first contact.

room_id.description: Existing room UUID. Omit to let the server create or resolve a room from `space_id`.

space_id.description: Space UUID used when starting a new conversation.

reported_user_id.description: Numeric user identifier serialized as a string.

reason.description: Moderation reason selected in the UI.

details.description: Optional free-form context provided by the reporter.

balanceMinor.description: Current available balance in minor units.

oneOf.description: Net settled amount in minor units.

WalletDashboardResponse.description: Wallet dashboard response used by the partner wallet page.

transactions.description: Wallet transactions for the current page.

totalEarnedMinor.description: Total charges credited to the wallet.

totalRefundedMinor.description: Total refunds debited from the wallet.

transactionCount.description: Number of transactions matching the current filters.

amountMinor.description: Requested payout amount in minor units.

WalletRefundRequest.description: Create a wallet-backed refund for an existing booking.

AuthEmailRequest.description: Single-email request body used by sign-up availability and OTP routes.

SignupRequest.description: Create a customer account after email ownership has been verified.

AuthProfilePatchRequest.description: Update the current authenticated user profile.

AiAssistantRequest.description: AI assistant request body used by the marketplace conversational search experience.

messages.description: Conversation history used to continue a multi-turn assistant session.

conversation_id.description: Existing conversation UUID for persistence and continuation.

AiAssistantResponse.description: Representative AI assistant response. The exact shape may expand as the toolchain evolves.

tool_calls.description: Normalized tool invocations emitted during the assistant turn.

AiConversationCreateRequest.description: Create a persisted AI conversation shell.

PriceRuleVariable.description: Variable declaration used by the pricing-rule editor.

initialValue.description: Optional initial value supplied by the editor.

userInput.description: Whether the editor expects user input for the variable.

PriceRuleOperand.description: Operand used in a pricing-rule comparison expression.

connector.description: Boolean connector joining the previous condition.

negated.description: Whether the condition result is negated before evaluation.

formula.description: Formula expression applied after conditions are evaluated.

PriceRuleRequest.description: Create or update a pricing rule.

linked_area_count.description: Number of areas currently using the rule.

PriceRuleEvaluationRequest.description: Preview a pricing rule without saving it.

variableOverrides.description: Additional variable overrides passed into the evaluator.

oneOf.description: Optional ISO timestamp for approval expiry.

GenericActionRequest.description: Broad action payload used by several mutation endpoints.

action.description: Action keyword selected by the operator.

data.description: Composite dashboard payload including metrics, recent records, and audit log slices.

ProviderAccountStatusResponse.description: Normalized partner payout-account snapshot returned by the financial provider-account status route.

AccountExportResponse.description: Account export payload containing user profile, bookings, wallet, and related records.

GenericDataResponse.description: Fallback success envelope for detail routes that return an object.

GenericListResponse.description: Fallback list envelope used when a more specific schema is not declared.

get.description: Access: Authenticated user. Returns an account export bundle for the signed-in user, including the profile and related marketplace records.
